images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful Japanese female model with flawless skin texture and large expressive eyes, perched playfully on a modern kitchen counter. She is wearing an unbuttoned beige trench coat worn as a dress, revealing the curve of her collarbones and the lace trim of her lingerie underneath, the fabric draping softly over her slim waist and ample chest. She strikes a dynamic pose, leaning forward with a playful wink and a mischievous smile, directly engaging the viewer. The scene is illuminated by vibrant neon sign lighting, casting bright, colorful glows across her face and the sleek marble surfaces, creating an avant-garde artistic atmosphere with a bleach bypass color grade that heightens contrast while lowering saturation. The background is a blurred, high-end contemporary kitchen. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination.8k photo, Large breasts
